name: Spiced Avocado Toast
tagline: Whole-grain toast with mashed avocado, chili, and lemon — HDL-friendly fats
highlight: Avocado fat raises HDL while lowering LDL — both directions of lipid health

hero.alt: Toasted whole-grain bread topped with mashed avocado, red chili flakes, and sesame seeds
hero.caption: avocado toast — chili-lime, sesame-finished

healthFacts: One avocado: 20g mono-unsaturated fats, 14g fiber, 700mg potassium.
Folate content (~120µg per fruit) supports homocysteine clearance.
Vitamin E and lutein in avocado support skin and eye health.
Pairing with whole-grain bread balances the meal with slow carbs and B vitamins.

steps.title: Toast the bread
steps.detail: Toast two slices of whole-grain or multigrain bread till golden and crisp on both sides.
steps.tip: Sourdough multigrain works beautifully — the chew supports the soft topping.

steps.title: Mash the avocado
steps.detail: Halve the avocado, scoop into a bowl. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Mash with a fork — leave it chunky, not puréed.
steps.tip: Lemon stops avocado browning; salt brings out the buttery flavour.

steps.title: Top and serve
steps.detail: Spread mashed avocado generously on toast. Sprinkle chili flakes, sesame seeds, and coriander. Eat immediately.
steps.tip: Top with a poached egg for extra protein and B12.
